positive: An intricate, stylized composition of celestial elements merging with natural flora. The central motif is a majestic crescent moon cradling stylized, bioluminescent jungle leaves and blooming exotic flowers. Include deep indigo blues, vibrant emerald greens, and pops of luminous gold for contrast. The overall style should be Neo-Art Nouveau meets cosmic watercolor, characterized by elegant, flowing linework and perfect symmetry. Perfect for a clean, high-contrast silhouette print on apparel. Isolated on a pure white background, vector-like quality, minimal shading, strong ornamental detail, centered composition, high contrast, 4K resolution.
